news.paragraph: Broadcom is seeing positive analyst momentum following price target increases from Citigroup, which raised its target to $500 citing strong AI demand. Traders should weigh the potential impact of the upcoming April quarter results, which may serve as a significant catalyst for the stock. The news also highlights interest in the company's ability to leverage pricing power through its VMware integration.
headlines: Get Paid 12% To Buy AVGO At A 30% Discount - Here's How
Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Broadcom to $500 From $475, Maintains Buy Rating
Citi Raises Broadcom Price Target to $500: AI Demand Sets Up Another Big April Quarter
